title: Unforgettable Egyptian Chickpea Salad
description: A vibrant, herbaceous chickpea salad with a tangy vinaigrette and crunchy toasted pita croutons, perfect for a comforting, egg‑free Egyptian-inspired lunch.
instructions: Drain and rinse the canned chickpeas, then set aside in a bowl.
Toast the pita bread cubes in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden, about 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a small bowl whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, tahini, salt, pepper, and cumin until emulsified.
Roughly chop parsley, mint, and red onion, and halve the cherry tomatoes.
Add the chopped herbs, onion, tomatoes, and toasted pita cubes to the chickpeas.
Pour the vinaigrette over the mixture and toss gently until evenly coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt, pepper, or lemon if needed.
Transfer the salad to a serving dish and let it rest for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Garnish with a drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of extra mint before serving.
